mapper.select: SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.VD_CD, R.ADJ_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ADJ_TYP_NM, R.CALC_BASE, R.RATE, R.UNIT_AMT, R.SIGN_TYP, TO_CHAR(R.VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(R.VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, R.REMARK, R.USE_YN, R.REG_ID FROM CL_ADJ_RATE R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='CL_ADJ_TYP' AND T.CD=R.ADJ_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N' AND R.VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND R.ADJ_TYP=#{adjTyp} ORDER BY R.ADJ_TYP, R.VD_CD NULLS FIRST

SELECT ID, COMP_CD, VD_CD, ADJ_TYP, ADJ_TYP_NM, CALC_BASE, RATE, UNIT_AMT, SIGN_TYP, REMARK FROM ( SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.VD_CD, R.ADJ_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ADJ_TYP_NM, R.CALC_BASE, R.RATE, R.UNIT_AMT, R.SIGN_TYP, R.REMARK, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY R.ADJ_TYP ORDER BY R.VD_CD DESC NULLS LAST) AS RN FROM CL_ADJ_RATE R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='CL_ADJ_TYP' AND T.CD=R.ADJ_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N' AND R.USE_YN='Y' AND R.COMP_CD=#{compCd} AND (R.VD_CD=#{vdCd} OR R.VD_CD IS NULL) AND TO_DATE(#{ymd},'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN R.VALID_SD AND R.VALID_ED ) WHERE RN = 1 ORDER BY ADJ_TYP

SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.VD_CD, R.ADJ_TYP, R.CALC_BASE, R.RATE, R.UNIT_AMT, R.SIGN_TYP, TO_CHAR(R.VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(R.VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, R.REMARK, R.USE_YN FROM CL_ADJ_RATE R WHERE R.ID=#{id} AND R.DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CL_ADJ_RATE (COMP_CD, VD_CD, ADJ_TYP, CALC_BASE, RATE, UNIT_AMT, SIGN_TYP, VALID_SD, VALID_ED, REMARK, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{vdCd}, #{adjTyp}, NVL(#{calcBase},'SUPL'), NVL(#{rate},0), NVL(#{unitAmt},0), NVL(#{signTyp},'-'), TO_DATE(#{validSd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{validEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{remark}, NVL(#{useYn},'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE CL_ADJ_RATE SET VD_CD=#{vdCd}, ADJ_TYP=#{adjTyp}, CALC_BASE=#{calcBase}, RATE=NVL(#{rate},0), UNIT_AMT=NVL(#{unitAmt},0), SIGN_TYP=#{signTyp}, VALID_SD=TO_DATE(#{validSd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), VALID_ED=TO_DATE(#{validEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), REMARK=#{remark}, USE_YN=#{useYn}, MOD_ID=#{regId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE CL_ADJ_RATE SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, A.CLOSE_ID, A.LINE_NO, A.ADJ_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ADJ_TYP_NM, A.CALC_BASE, A.BASE_AMT, A.RATE, A.UNIT_AMT, A.SIGN_TYP, A.ADJ_AMT, A.REMARK FROM CL_CLOSE_ADJ A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='CL_ADJ_TYP' AND T.CD=A.ADJ_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.CLOSE_ID=#{closeId} ORDER BY A.LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CL_CLOSE_ADJ (CLOSE_ID, LINE_NO, ADJ_TYP, CALC_BASE, BASE_AMT, RATE, UNIT_AMT, SIGN_TYP, ADJ_AMT, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{closeId}, #{lineNo}, #{adjTyp}, #{calcBase}, NVL(#{baseAmt},0), NVL(#{rate},0), NVL(#{unitAmt},0), #{signTyp}, NVL(#{adjAmt},0), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.update: UPDATE CL_CLOSE SET ADJ_AMT=#{adjAmt}, NET_AMT=#{netAmt}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{closeId}
